title: Maelekezo na Mtaani
description: Learn how to ask for and give directions. Master navigation vocabulary to help others find their way.
description_sw: Jifunze jinsi ya kuuliza na kutoa maelekezo ya njia. Simamia maneno ya njia ili kusaidia wengine kupata njia sahihi.
sofia_intro: Today we learn how to ask for and give directions. This is essential when you are out in the community or need help finding a place.
sofia_intro_sw: Leo tutajifunza jinsi ya kuuliza na kutoa maelekezo ya njia. Hii itakusaidia usipotee na uweze kusaidia wengine unapokuwa mtaani au mjini.

lessons.title: Direction Vocabulary
lessons.sofia_hint: Click each direction word to hear it. Use these when you need help navigating!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Bonyeza kila neno la njia kulisikia. Tumia haya unapohitaji kusaidiwa kuelekezana!

words.example: The school is far from here.
I see you at the corner.

lessons.title: Community Buildings
lessons.sofia_hint: Click each building to hear it. These are places you visit every day!
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Bonyeza kila jengo kulisikia. Hizi ni mahali unayotembea kila siku!

words.example: The hospital is near the market.
The school is across the street.
I am going to the market.
The post office closes at 5 PM.
Let us meet at the park.

lessons.title: Directions and Navigation Quiz
lessons.sofia_hint: Choose the correct direction or location to complete each sentence.
lessons.sofia_hint_sw: Chagua njia au mahali sahihi kukamilisha kila sentensi.

options: The angle where two streets meet
options_sw: The angle where two streets meet

questions.prompt: Which building helps you with money? (Jengo lipi linakusaidia na pesa?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which building helps you with money? (Jengo lipi linakusaidia na pesa?)

questions.prompt: Go straight to the ________. (Nenda moja kwa moja hadi sokoni)
questions.prompt_sw: Go straight to the ________. (Nenda moja kwa moja hadi sokoni)

questions.prompt: The ________ is next to the bank. (Hospitali ipo karibu na benki)
questions.prompt_sw: The ________ is next to the bank. (Hospitali ipo karibu na benki)

questions.prompt: Which direction is opposite of 'Left'? (Njia ipi ni kinyume cha 'Left'?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which direction is opposite of 'Left'? (Njia ipi ni kinyume cha 'Left'?)

questions.prompt: 'Go straight to the market' means: ('Nenda moja kwa moja mpaka sokoni' inamaanisha:)
questions.prompt_sw: 'Go straight to the market' means: ('Nenda moja kwa moja mpaka sokoni' inamaanisha:)

questions.prompt: What is a 'Post Office'? (Ofisi ya Posta ni nini?)
questions.prompt_sw: What is a 'Post Office'? (Ofisi ya Posta ni nini?)
options: A place to send letters and packages
options_sw: Mahali pa kutuma barua na vifurushi

questions.prompt: Which is nearest in your community? (Lipi ni karibu zaidi katika jamii yako?)
questions.prompt_sw: Which is nearest in your community? (Lipi ni karibu zaidi katika jamii yako?)

questions.prompt: You say 'The hospital is near the market' when: (Unasema 'The hospital is near the market' lini:)
questions.prompt_sw: You say 'The hospital is near the market' when: (Unasema 'The hospital is near the market' lini:)
options: The hospital is far from market
The hospital is very close to the market
options_sw: Hospitali iko sana karibu na soko
